summary: Diff adds a Notifications/Admin view reachable from a header “Bookings” button (sheet), a React Query hook to fetch bookings with IDs, and a backend query method returning (id, booking) pairs sorted newest-first. Tempo Traveller appears removed from the vehicle pricing section and the vehicle set image reference is updated, but evidence is incomplete for the booking form’s car-type options and for the presence of the new generated image asset file in public assets.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the Tempo Traveller option from the booking flow vehicle selection so users can only choose Sedan or SUV.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for BookingForm.tsx is truncated before the car type <Select> options are shown, so there is no direct evidence that the Tempo Traveller option was removed from the 'Car Type' select.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the updated static vehicle set image under frontend/public/assets/generated (vehicle-set-no-tempo.dim_1200x400.png) so the rendered image no longer depicts a Tempo Traveller.
missing_requirements.reason: VehiclePricingSection.tsx references the new filename, but the diff summary does not show an added/modified static asset file under frontend/public/assets/generated, so existence of the new image cannot be verified from the provided diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed backend createBooking to return a concatenated string "bookingId name phone" and updated frontend to parse the ID from that string.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not ask to change the createBooking return type/format; it only requested adding a query method for bookings with IDs.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced a duplicate useBookingsWithIds hook implementation in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts in addition to the new dedicated frontend/src/hooks/useBookingsWithIds.ts file.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not request refactoring/duplicating hooks; this adds extra surface area and potential confusion without an explicit requirement.
